text.title: tech-debt-management Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for tech-debt-management as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Pre-commit gates configured too strictly (threshold 5 complexity on legacy code).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Over-strict gates become bypassed with --no-verify, losing all enforcement. Set thresholds at current median + 10%, then tighten each quarter.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: CI catches regressions after the fact; developers get slow feedback. Pre-commit gates catch at the moment of writing, when fixing is cheapest.
